description: CompositionPurple sweatshirt made of 100% polyester, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, full front zipper with a ribbed hem, has two zippered pockets on the sides, and branding printed on left chest FittingComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak or wringDry flat in shade and set shape when wetModerate warm ironWelcome the winter in style this season with this sweatshirt from puma. The thick fabric is sure to keep the winter chill at bay, while you can slip your hands into the pockets to keep them warm. Wear this sweatshirt over jeans to keep the cold winds away.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in sweatshirtsHeight: 6'3”; Shoulders: 19"
